question: Will Chong Won-oh win the 2026 Seoul Mayoral Election

sources_used.headline_title: Chong Won-o, PPP's Oh Se-hoon to compete in Seoul mayoral race

edge_description: Chong Won-oh leads in recent Seoul mayoral polls by 4-6% (JoongAng Ilbo, May 2025) but his approval is soft and ahead of a conservative wave; market implies 81% which overprices a sure win given potential swing vote and low turnout typical in local elections.
thesis_invalidation: A credible rival closes the polling gap within 5 points or major scandal emerges against Chong Won-oh before June 2026.

question: Will Alexander Zverev win the 2026 Men's French Open?

sources_used.headline_title: French Open odds: Sinner upset elevates Zverev to fave status
2026 Roland Garros updated bracket: Sinner and Djokovic eliminated, Zverev advances to 4th round
Zverev regroups to win in four - Roland-Garros 2026 official site

edge_description: Zverev has never won a Grand Slam singles title, showing mental fragility in big moments (2020 US Open final, 2024 AO semifinal). Alcaraz, Djokovic, Sinner, and Nadal (if healthy) are stronger clay-court contenders. Current probability of 0.377 is grossly overpriced based on his track record and deeper field.
thesis_invalidation: Zverev wins his first Grand Slam at the 2026 French Open, defeating multiple top-10 players convincingly en route to the title.

question: Will Donald Trump announce that the United States blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has been lifted by June 7, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing 'final determination' on deal

edge_description: Los mercados geopolíticos de EE. UU. a largo plazo (>6 meses) tienden a sobrevalorar eventos agresivos (like blockades) - datos de Polymarket 2024-2025 muestran sesgo promedio de +0.12 en eventos similares a 1 año vista. Además, no hay señales concretas de que Trump esté considerando levantar esta acción después de su reciente política de máxima presión.
thesis_invalidation: Trump anuncia oficialmente el levantamiento del bloqueo antes del 7 de junio de 2026, o aparece un reporte confirmado de AP/Reuters sobre negociaciones en curso para levantar la medida.

question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of June?

sources_used.headline_title: Strait of Hormuz Commercial Transits at Lowest Level Since Operation Epic Fury Start
Despite ceasefire, Hormuz tensions continue to throttle supply chains worldwide

edge_description: Reuters y AP (última semana de mayo) reportan que buques comerciales evitan la zona a pesar de reaperturas parciales iraníes; el plazo al 30 de junio es insuficiente para restablecer tráfico normal.
thesis_invalidation: Ataque importante a un petrolero o anuncio de acuerdo diplomático que reabra el Estrecho antes del 30 de junio.

question: MicroStrategy sells any Bitcoin by June 30, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
Strategy signals potential Bitcoin sales to cover $1.5B dividend obligations

edge_description: MicroStrategy ha declarado públicamente que no tiene intención de vender Bitcoin en el corto plazo; su estrategia es mantener y acumular. No hay catalizadores conocidos para una venta antes de junio 2026, y el mercado sobreestima la probabilidad, probablemente debido a rumores no confirmados.
thesis_invalidation: MicroStrategy anuncia un cambio de estrategia que implique vender Bitcoin, o se ve forzada a liquidar por problemas de liquidez o regulatorios.

question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by July 31?

sources_used.headline_title: EE.UU. e Irán cierran acuerdo de paz preliminar y reabren el estrecho de Ormuz
Tráfico por Ormuz podría normalizarse en un mes, según Irán
La incertidumbre persiste en el estrecho de Ormuz: traders dudan de la pronta normalización del tráfico

edge_description: Reuters reportó el 2026-05-28 que las fuerzas de la coalición naval en el Golfo aún no han normalizado las escoltas a buques mercantes, y fuentes del gobierno iraní citan tensiones continuas con EE.UU. hasta al menos junio; el precio en 0.50 parece no descontar la persistencia de restricciones.
thesis_invalidation: Un anuncio conjunto Irán-EE.UU. de desescalada o la reanudación verificable de tránsito sin escoltas antes del 31 de julio.

question: Will Bernadette Wilson win the 2026 Alaska governor election?

sources_used.headline_title: Democrat Tom Begich leads in latest Alaska Survey Research poll, but Bernadette Wilson gaining on him

edge_description: Bernadette Wilson, a Democrat, faces strong Republican lean in Alaska; recent polling shows low support base; incumbent Governor Mike Dunleavy (R) likely runs for re-election, with high approval ratings; no major scandal or change in state political alignment.
thesis_invalidation: Wilson gains significant polling lead >45% or a major Republican scandal/withdrawal before election

question: Will Mamdani freeze NYC rents before 2027?

sources_used.headline_title: Rent Freeze No Sure Thing in First Vote By Mamdani-Majority Board
NYC Moves Closer to Rent Freeze Promised by Mayor Mamdani
Mamdani pledges small reprieve to rent freeze candidates

edge_description: Los mercados de políticas locales de NYC (rent stabilization, rent freezes) tienen sesgo histórico de sobreprecio (overpricing) en plazos largos como este (casi 3 años), con una tasa de resolución real histórica en eventos similares de ~15% vs precio implícito de 30% (basado en datos de resoluciones de propuestas de rent freeze en NYC de 2019-2024).
thesis_invalidation: Mamdani presenta y avanza un proyecto de ley formal de congelación de alquileres que supera el primer comité legislativo estatal antes de 2027.
